Connected Services

Services that work together.

SEO feeds content. Content feeds funnels. Funnels feed email. Run them separately and they perform like separate services. Build them as one program and each one amplifies the rest.

Proven Results

Outcomes, not opinions.

Six verified client results. Strategy, execution timeline, and real revenue numbers. Documented and available on request.

Home Services

5X Revenue Growth

Landscaping Company

A complete website rebuild and local SEO campaign turned this business around. Revenue went from $2,000/mo to $11,500/mo in 8 months.

Why Clients Switch To KINEXIS

You've been here before.

Another agency. Another promise. Another quarterly report full of impressions that don't touch your pipeline.

Before

Agency A

Disconnected
Q4 dashboard

Impressions

3.2M

Engagement

0.6%

Revenue

↓ 34%

Pipeline value↓ 22%

  • Three-day email loops and vague updates. Urgent issues wait until your next scheduled call while ad spend keeps burning.

  • A PDF once a quarter, if you're lucky. No visibility into what's working, what's wasted, or what changed last week.

  • Black-box billing and unclear scope. You never know who's doing the work or where your budget actually goes.

  • They celebrate impressions and clicks while your pipeline stays flat. Activity looks busy. Revenue does not move.

  • Every quarter someone new owns your account. Context resets and you're re-explaining your business from scratch.

After

KINEXIS

Revenue-aligned
Live KPI board

Impressions

580K

Engagement

8.4%

Revenue

+47%

Pipeline value↑ 3.2×

  • Every Monday: spend, leads, CPL, and pipeline in one digest. You always know where you stand and what's being optimized.

  • We agree on targets upfront: revenue, cost per lead, conversion rate. We report against them every week.

  • One senior strategist owns your account end-to-end. They know your business, market, and numbers. No handoffs.

  • We track what hits your P&L: qualified leads, close rate, ROAS, and LTV. Vanity metrics are context, never the headline.

  • Skip the ticket queue. When something matters, you're talking to decision-makers who can change direction fast.

Learn About Us
Let's Talk

Ready to Build a Revenue System?

No deck. No rehearsed presentation. Bring your actual situation: what's not working, what you've already tried, what you're hoping to fix. We'll have an honest conversation about whether we can help.

No long-term contracts. Month to month.
